notes: Found on a note behind the reception desk in the main lobby.
Cipher is written on the whiteboard in the control room.
Look for the sticky note on the underside of the desk drawer.
Posted on the bulletin board near the north entrance.
Scratched into the wall behind the generator in the basement.
On a crumpled receipt inside the ticket booth.
Written in marker on the bathroom mirror, 4th floor.
Audio log in the adjacent room contains the combination.
